headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher On Strong Global Manufacturing Data
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Tuesday, Jun, 2 2026 US stock futures are pointing slightly higher this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts up about 0.2% and Nasdaq-100 futures ahead roughly 0.3%, as investors weigh stronger global manufacturing data against higher borrowing costs. Several key factory scorecards, such as the China Manufacturing PMI at 51.8 and the UK gauge at 53.9, signal production is picking up, which suggests healthier demand for goods and raw materials.
